_doc: Canonical wire-shape fixture (story-007). The single source of truth both lanes assert against: the Python agent publishers must serialize these exact shapes, and the TS mobile handlers/parsers must accept them. A key rename on either side fails its lane's wire-contract test instead of silently rendering a blank value (concern 82fc). Each event is the full top-level wire object {type, ...payload} as flat-merged by game_events.publish_game_event.
